endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/variables
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/variables/{variableName}
endpoints.description: Retrieve the variable identified by variable name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{VARIABLENAME}} with a real variablename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Automation/automationAccounts/{automationAccountName}/variables/{variableName}

Replace {{AUTOMATIONACCOUNTNAME}} with a real automationaccountname. Replace {{VARIABLENAME}} with a real variablename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
